description: Search for or read a FHIR Patient resource. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, this tool enforces strict identification and accepts only one of these parameter sets: identifier (MRN, FHIR ID, or other system|value identifier); given + family + birthdate; or given + family + legal-sex (or gender) + telecom. A name fragment alone is never accepted.

searchParams._id: Patient resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.active: Whether the patient record is active
searchParams.address-use: Use of the address (home, work, temp, old)
searchParams.birthdate: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format
searchParams.death-date: Date of death in YYYY-MM-DD format
searchParams.doc-type: Singapore document type (only respected when a Singapore document ID is passed as an identifier)
searchParams.gender: Administrative gender: female, male, other, unknown
searchParams.general-practitioner: Patient's nominated primary care provider (Practitioner, Organization, PractitionerRole)
searchParams.identifier: Business identifier in system|value format (e.g. MRN, SSN, FHIR ID)
searchParams.legal-sex: Legal sex — takes precedence over gender when both are provided: female, male, nonbinary, x, unknown
searchParams.link: Another Patient or RelatedPerson resource linked to this patient
searchParams.name: Any part of the patient's name — ignored when family or given is also provided
searchParams.organization: Managing organization for the patient record
searchParams.own-name: Patient's own last name (non-US names) — used with other name parameters
searchParams.own-prefix: Patient's own last name prefix (non-US names) — requires own-name
searchParams.partner-name: Patient's spouse's last name (non-US names) — requires own-name
searchParams.partner-prefix: Patient's spouse's last name prefix (non-US names) — requires own-name
searchParams.phonetic: A portion of the name using phonetic matching
searchParams.telecom: Phone number or email address (prefix # to skip phone validation, + for international)
